title: Job Opening Teacher at MT Educare

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at MT Educare
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MT Educare. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About MT Educare:
MT Educare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
